notes:
[What's New]
- The Wall of Honor System: Celebrate your Heroes' achievements and unlock a brand-new progression path for fully upgraded SSR Heroes!
1. Access: Once a Hero reaches 10-Star, their Wall of Honor can be unlocked through the Hero Academy.
2. Core Progression: 10-Star Heroes are displayed by faction (Stalwart, Aeronaut, Rover, and Mariner). Spend Hero Fragments and Hero EXP to increase their Honor Level. Each Honor Level grants permanent Power bonuses.

[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Update

title: Hole It 3D
notes:
• Exciting new levels added
• New items introduced to enhance gameplay
• Various critical bug fixes and performance optimization

title: Skyblade: Idle Immortal-APAC
notes:
1. From June 18 to July 8, the Taorium Festival series of events will be open. Details are as follows:
Legacy Codex: Get rich rewards like Immortal Jades and Starcharts from the Legacy Codex. Unlocking advanced rewards also grants Voucher rebates and specific Earth Tier Citta Choice Boxes.
Prediction Conclave: During the Taorium Festival, participate in predictions of certain gameplays to enjoy a 50% increase in rewards upon success. Discounted items will also be added to the Celestial Conclave

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Game of Thrones: Dragonfire
notes:
Our dragons grow mightier with every flight!
Download the latest update for Dragonfire.
Step into the world of Game of Thrones: Dragonfire. Explore Westeros, grow your power, and raise dragons as Houses fight and the realm descends into war.
Read more at gotdragonfire.com!

title: Pokémon UNITE
notes:
●Holowear and Unite licenses for Skeledirge and Quaquaval will be available!
●The Rising Volt Tacklers special event will be available starting 2026-06-04!
Captain Pikachu Holowear and fashion items based on Liko and Roy will also be obtainable via events!
● Adjustments have been made to some aspects of the UI.
● Bug Fixes

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
The festivities continue in Season of Carnival! Design tricky trials to stump your neighbors, or prove your skills by conquering challenges created by the community.

Days of Color returns with exciting games and a kaleidoscope of new activities. Jump in to experience vibrant mini-games, new items, and more.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @thatgamecompany

title: Mech Assemble
notes:
1. Mech Awakening System: Unlocks Supreme+3 to 3 additional Mechs.
 2. The exclusive Mech Weapon Blazing Sunpiercer and its exclusive weapon skin are coming soon!
